The '''New Republic Department of Research and Development''' (also known as '''New Republic Research and Development''' and previously known as '''Rebel Alliance Research and Development''') was a department of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] responsible for developing technology for use by the New Republic.

One of their main functions was the design and manufacture of useful droids for the use of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]/[[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] and the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]]/[[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. Like the droids designed by the [[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]], these units were normally programmed with fail-safe commands preventing them from acting in a manner which could harm the Rebellion or the New Republic.

The department's fate following the reorganization of the New Republic into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] is currently unknown.
